title: Nitra, Nitra Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Nitra, Nitra Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Nitra is a city in Nitra Region with a population of 77,610. Slovakia’s oldest city, a historic center of the Great Moravian Empire, with a stunning castle, a vibrant university life, and a rich agricultural tradition.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
